subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Download and install a <version>. Uses .nvmrc if available and version is omitted

options.description: Skip binary download, install from source only
When installing, reinstall packages installed in <version>
When installing, only select from LTS (long-term support) versions
When installing, only select from versions for a specific LTS line
When installing, skip the default-packages file if it exists
After installing, attempt to upgrade to the latest working npm on the given node version
Disable the progress bar on any downloads
After installing, set the alias specified to the version specified. (same as: nvm alias <name> <version>)
After installing, set default alias to the version specified. (same as: nvm alias default <version>)
Uninstall using automatic LTS (long-term support) alias `lts/*`, if available
Uninstall using automatic alias for provided LTS line, if available

subcommands.name: use
subcommands.description: Modify PATH to use <version>. Uses .nvmrc if available and version is omitted

options.description: Silences stdout/stderr output
Uses automatic LTS (long-term support) alias `lts/*`, if available
Uses automatic alias for provided LTS line, if available

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.description: Run <command> on <version>. Uses .nvmrc if available and version is omitted

options.description: Silences stdout/stderr output
Uses automatic LTS (long-term support) alias `lts/*`, if available
Uses automatic alias for provided LTS line, if available

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Run `node` on <version> with <args> as arguments. Uses .nvmrc if available and version is omitted

options.description: Silences stdout/stderr output
Uses automatic LTS (long-term support) alias `lts/*`, if available
Uses automatic alias for provided LTS line, if available

subcommands.name: current
subcommands.description: Display currently activated version of Node

subcommands.name: ls
subcommands.description: List installed versions, matching a given <version> if provided

options.description: Suppress colored output
Suppress `nvm alias` output

subcommands.name: ls-remote
subcommands.description: List remote versions available for install, matching a given <version> if provided

options.description: When listing, only show LTS (long-term support) versions
When listing, only show versions for a specific LTS line
Suppress colored output

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Resolve the given description to a single local version

subcommands.name: version-remote
subcommands.description: Resolve the given description to a single remote version

options.description: When listing, only show LTS (long-term support) versions
When listing, only show versions for a specific LTS line

subcommands.name: deactivate
subcommands.description: Undo effects of `nvm` on current shell

options.description: Silences stdout/stderr output

subcommands.name: alias
subcommands.description: Show all aliases beginning with <pattern> or Set an alias named <name> pointing to <version>

subcommands.name: install-latest-npm
subcommands.description: Attempt to upgrade to the latest working `npm` on the current node version

subcommands.name: reinstall-packages
subcommands.description: Reinstall global `npm` packages contained in <version> to current version

subcommands.name: which
subcommands.description: Display path to installed node version. Uses .nvmrc if available and version is omitted

options.description: Silences stdout/stderr output when a version is omitted

subcommands.name: set-colors
subcommands.description: Set five text colors using format "yMeBg". Available when supported

options.description: Show help page
Print out the installed version of nvm
Suppress colored output
